TopBar.tagline: Historic Peninsula & Sea of Marmara View

Hero.title: Rooftop Dining With Hagia Sophia & Sea Views
Hero.subtitle: Turkish breakfast, charcoal kebabs, fresh seafood — served above the rooftops of Sultanahmet with a panoramic view of the historic peninsula.

Features.title: Three experiences that bring our guests back, again and again.
Features.f1_desc: Expertly grilled kebabs, fresh fish and a generous Turkish breakfast — a table that is both local and timeless.
Features.f2_desc: In the heart of Sultanahmet, yet above its bustle. On our terrace, Istanbul is not only seen — it is felt.
Features.f3_desc: Unpretentious but devoted: a service culture that respects every table, every guest and every moment.

About.title: A View Story in the Heart of Sultanahmet
About.lead: In the heart of Istanbul's historic peninsula, My Terrace Cafe Restaurant offers a dining experience where history meets flavour.
About.p1: Set in one of the most beautiful corners of Sultanahmet, a short walk from Hagia Sophia and the Blue Mosque, our rooftop terrace opens onto one of Istanbul's most captivating panoramas: the Sea of Marmara, passing ships and the golden light of sunset.
About.p2: Our day opens at 08:30 with a generous spread of Turkish breakfast, continues through the afternoon with charcoal kebabs and fresh seafood, and stretches late into the evening, with the view.
About.p3: With warm, genuine and unpretentious hospitality, we prepare every plate with care and welcome every guest like a friend. Our goal is to nourish not just your appetite, but your memories of Istanbul.

view.title: Panoramic View
view.desc: An uninterrupted view of Hagia Sophia, the Blue Mosque and the Sea of Marmara.

food.title: Authentic Flavour
food.desc: Dishes prepared with traditional recipes and fresh, seasonal ingredients.

service.title: Warm Service
service.desc: Turkish, English, Arabic and German — a team that smiles in your language.

location.title: Central Location
location.desc: Just a few minutes' walk from Hagia Sophia and the Blue Mosque.

About.visitText: Open every day from 08:30 to 01:00. We recommend booking ahead for a table with a view.

FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.subtitle: The questions guests ask most before visiting.
FAQ.q1: Can I come without a reservation?
FAQ.a1: Yes, we happily welcome walk-in guests. However, as weekends and evenings can get busy, we recommend booking ahead to secure a table with a view.
FAQ.q2: Are there vegetarian or gluten-free options on the menu?
FAQ.a2: Yes, our menu includes both vegetarian and gluten-free options. If you have any dietary needs, just let our team know when ordering.
FAQ.a3: Yes, our kitchen uses halal meat and products, so our Muslim guests can dine with complete peace of mind.
FAQ.q4: How far are you from Hagia Sophia and the Blue Mosque?
FAQ.a4: My Terrace is about an 8–10 minute walk from Hagia Sophia and the Blue Mosque; we are right in the centre of the historic peninsula.
FAQ.q5: What are your breakfast hours, and do you serve a Turkish breakfast spread?
FAQ.a5: We serve a generous Turkish breakfast spread every morning from 08:30 — the perfect way to start the day with a view.
FAQ.q6: Which tables have the best view?
FAQ.a6: Our terrace level stands out with its sea and historic-peninsula view. If you'd like a table with a view, simply mention it when you book.
FAQ.q7: Can I book for groups or special celebrations?
FAQ.a7: Yes — our rooftop is ideal for sunsets and celebrations; arrange group bookings easily on WhatsApp.
FAQ.q8: What is the best time for sunset?
FAQ.a8: We recommend arriving about an hour before sunset; our terrace is a wonderful spot to watch the sun set over the Sea of Marmara.
FAQ.a9: Yes, we offer a warm, comfortable and family-friendly atmosphere and gladly welcome guests with children.
FAQ.q10: Do you offer takeaway or delivery?
FAQ.a10: Yes, we offer both takeaway and delivery. You can order by calling us or messaging us on WhatsApp.

Contact.title: Get in Touch
Contact.subtitle: We're here for reservations, questions and special occasions.
Contact.reserveText: For the fastest response, message us on WhatsApp and our team will get back to you shortly.

Footer.tagline: Rooftop terrace restaurant in Sultanahmet with Hagia Sophia and sea views. Turkish breakfast, kebabs, seafood.
